use_cases: Horizontal tab navigation with smooth sliding indicator animation
Category filtering in dashboards and admin panels
Section switching in landing pages and marketing sites
Mobile-friendly navigation menus with gesture support
ai_summary: A sliding tabs component with animated indicator that smoothly transitions between tab items. Built with Radix UI primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS using CVA for variant management. Features hover states, keyboard navigation support, and responsive design suitable for dashboard navigation, category filters, and step-based interfaces across web applications.
